requirement_topic.en: Market-entry package — RETIE/RETIQ compliance chain and SIC Certificate of Conformity
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入包——RETE/RETIQ合规链条与SIC合格证明
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入包——RETIE/RETIQ 合規鏈條與 SIC 合格證

summary.en: Colombian refrigerators require importer-linked filing through onshore regulatory channels. The practical route includes ONAC-recognized safety conformity evidence for RETIE/RETILAP, RETIQ-related energy declaration and label filing, and a SIC Certificate of Conformity as the destination-market compliance artifact before sale. Port clearance is commonly processed through Cartagena or Buenaventura.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚冰箱需要经由境内责任主体完成监管提交。实际路径通常包括：通过ONAC认可体系形成的 RETIE/RETILAP 电气安全合格证明、RETIQ能效申报与标签环节、以及由SIC出具的合格证（CoC）作为市场准入凭证。清关常通过卡塔赫纳或布埃纳文图拉港口。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞冰箱需要由境內責任主體完成監管提交。實務路徑通常包括：透過 ONAC 認可體系形成之 RETIE/RETILAP 電氣安全合格證明、RETIQ 能效申報與標籤環節，以及由 SIC 出具之合格證（CoC）作為市場准入憑證。清關常經由卡塔赫納或布埃納文圖拉港口。

standards_or_laws: RETIE and RETILAP regulatory control framework for household electrical equipment
RETIQ market-control filing for energy labeling
SIC administrative controls for imported refrigerators

summary.en: China requires CCC and related conformity evidence before domestic placement, combined with CEL labelling under GB 12021.2. CCC does not by itself satisfy Colombian destination-market filing because Colombia operates a separate onshore market-control chain involving SIC and RETIQ-linked documentation.
summary.zh: 中国在国内要求CCC及CEL等一致性证据，但CCC不能直接满足哥伦比亚目标市场准入要求，后者需依靠SIC与RETIQ相关文件链独立履行。
summary.zht: 中國在國內要求 CCC 及 CEL 等一致性證據，但 CCC 無法直接滿足哥倫比亞目的地市場准入要求，後者需依賴 SIC 與 RETIQ 相關文件鏈獨立履行。

standards_or_laws: CCC framework — GB 4706.13 safety and GB 4343.1 EMC (where applicable)
GB 12021.2 and China Energy Label system

gap.en: There is no one-to-one import certificate substitution. Chinese CCC and CEL packages are baseline technical references, but Colombia requires destination-specific filing and marking through SIC/RETIQ channels. A model may pass China domestic controls and still fail entry if destination paperwork, importer registration, and local filing status are incomplete.
gap.zh: 不存在一对一证书替代。中国CCC和CEL是技术基础，但哥伦比亚要求通过SIC/RETIQ的目的地文件和标识提交。即使型号符合中国国内要求，若目的地文件链、进口商登记和备案状态不完整，仍可能无法入场。
gap.zht: 不存在一對一證書替代。中國 CCC 與 CEL 是技術基礎，但哥倫比亞要求透過 SIC/RETIQ 的目的地文件和標誌提交。即使機型符合中國國內要求，若目的地文件鏈、進口商登記和備案狀態不完整，仍可能無法入場。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RETILAP/RETIE technical filing plus RETIQ-related labeling and SIC Certificate of Conformity are required before Colombian sale
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC and CEL are mandatory before sale in China

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio (SIC), Colombia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombia entry depends on destination filing architecture rather than simple certificate carryover. Ensure ONAC-aligned test evidence is translated into the SIC/RETIQ filing package and that Cartagena/Buenaventura customs documentation is complete before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚准入依赖目的地备案架构而非证书单向移植。需将 ONAC 对齐的测试证据转换为 SIC/RETIQ 备案材料，并确保卡塔赫纳/布埃纳文图拉清关文件完整后方可出货。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞准入依賴目的地備案架構而非證書單向移植。需將 ONAC 對齊的測試證據轉換為 SIC/RETIQ 備案資料，並確保卡塔赫納/布埃納文圖拉清關文件完整後才可出貨。

requirement_topic.en: In-country importer and radio compliance owner in Colombia
requirement_topic.zh: 本地进口商与射频合规责任方
requirement_topic.zht: 本地進口商與射頻合規責任方

summary.en: Colombia requires an import-side responsible structure for placement; the local importer is typically the practical holder of compliance duties such as filing, document retention, and regulatory communication. For smart models with radio capability, CRC/ANE-level approval handling is usually coordinated by that importer.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚要求面向进口的责任机制，实际责任通常由本地进口商承担，包括备案、文件保管和监管沟通。对于带无线模块的机型，CRC/ANE类无线审批通常由进口商协调完成。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞要求面向進口的責任機制，實務責任通常由本地進口商承擔，包括備案、文件保存及監管溝通。對於帶無線模組機型，CRC/ANE 類無線核准通常由進口商協調完成。

standards_or_laws: SIC destination importer obligations in conformity documentation flow
CRC/ANE radio compliance handling for wireless devices

summary.en: China assigns compliance ownership to Chinese manufacturers and certifying schemes for domestic placement, while export channels often rely on commercial overseas partners but do not replace destination legal responsibility. Thus, Chinese evidence cannot replace Colombian importer-led responsibility expectations.
summary.zh: 中国对国内销售的合规责任由制造商和认证体系承担，出口常由海外商贸伙伴承接商业流程，但这不等同于哥伦比亚法定的目的地责任主体。故中国证据不能替代哥伦比亚进出口责任要求。
summary.zht: 中國對國內銷售的合規責任由製造商和認證體系承擔，出口常由海外商貿夥伴承接商業流程，但這不等同於哥倫比亞法定的目的地責任主體。故中國證據不能替代哥倫比亞進出口責任要求。

gap.en: The gap is organizational, not purely technical. Exporters must designate or work through a Colombian importer that can maintain local filing and evidence. If this is absent, customs and regulatory checks may still stall even when factory and lab evidence is ready.
gap.zh: 差距以组织职责为主。出口商必须指定或通过能够承担本地备案和证据保存的哥伦比亚进口商操作。缺失该角色时，即使工厂测试资料齐全，也可能在海关和监管中被阻滞。
gap.zht: 差距以組織職責為主。出口商必須指定或通過能夠承擔本地備案與證據保存的哥倫比亞進口商運作。缺失該角色時，即使工廠測試資料齊全，也可能在海關與監管中受阻。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — a local compliance holder is needed for Colombian filing and customs-linked market access steps
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese export chain coordination, with no direct destination legal mapping

source.publisher: Colombian telecommunications and market-channel regulators for importer responsibilities

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombia typically executes market placement through an in-country importer-responsible model. Without importer-led filing and communication, CONFORMITY evidence alone is operationally insufficient. Arrange importer controls before dispatch and before seeking customs entry via Cartagena or Buenaventura.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚通常通过本地进口商责任模型执行市场准入。若缺乏进口商主导的备案与沟通，仅有制造商或工厂合规证据不足以推进入场流程。请在出运及卡塔赫纳/布埃纳文图拉清关前完成进口商端控制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞通常透過本地進口商責任模型執行市場准入。若缺乏進口商主導的備案與溝通，僅有製造商或工廠合規證據不足以推進入場流程。請在出運及卡塔赫納/布埃納文圖拉清關前完成進口商端控制。
